title: Point Reyes Light — February 20, 1964 (Page 4)
author: Point Reyes Light Staff
card_summary: A single page from the Point Reyes Light, a weekly community newspaper serving Point Reyes Station, California, dated February 20, 1964, Page 4. Philip K. Dick lived in the Point Reyes area during this period. Issues from this paper are preserved as contextual documents relating to his local environment and community life.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Point Reyes Light (Point Reyes Station, California), dated Thursday, February 20, 1964, page 4. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 5, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

By early 1964, Dick's life in Marin County was nearing its end. His marriage to Anne Dick had dissolved, and he would soon relocate to the East Bay. The Point Reyes Light documented local community life in western Marin County during this transitional period. The specific content and its connection to Dick studies remain to be determined through direct examination of the scanned image.
